metadata.summary: A Python client for the public X API.

documentation:
# x-api-client

A Python client for the public X API.

Note: This should be used for personal use only. It's very unreliable due to X blocking requests often.

## Installation

```bash
uv add x-api-client
```

## Example

```python
import asyncio

from xclient import XError, XClient


async def main():
    async with XClient(
        auth_token="",
        api_token="",
        csrf_token="",
        client_transaction_id="",
    ) as client:
        try:
            create_tweet = await client.create_tweet(text="Hello, world!")
            print(create_tweet)
        except XError as e:
            print(f"Error: {e}")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"Unexpected error: {e}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
```

classes.name: xclient.models.actions.FavoriteResult
documentation: Represents the result of a favorite/unfavorite action.

classes.name: xclient.models.actions.RetweetResult
documentation: Represents the result of a retweet/unretweet action.

class_variables.name: xclient.models.timestamp.Timestamp.indices
documentation: The position of the timestamp in the tweet text

class_variables.name: xclient.models.timestamp.Timestamp.seconds
documentation: The number of seconds into the video

class_variables.name: xclient.models.timestamp.Timestamp.text
documentation: The display text of the timestamp (e.g. "1:30")

Model representing a timestamp in a tweet.
Used for video timestamps that can be clicked to jump to specific points in videos.

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the X API client.

Args:
    auth_token: X authentication token
    api_token: X API token
    csrf_token: CSRF token
    client_transaction_id: Client transaction ID
    user_agent: Custom user agent string (optional)
    timeout: Request timeout in seconds (default: 30.0)
    client: Custom httpx.AsyncClient instance (optional)

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.headers
documentation: Get the default headers for API requests.

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.cookies
documentation: Get the default cookies for API requests.

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient._handle_response
documentation: Handle the API response and raise appropriate exceptions.

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient._get
documentation:
Make a GET request to the X API.

Args:
    operation: GraphQL operation name
    variables: GraphQL variables
    features: Feature flags
    field_toggles: Field toggles

Returns:
    API response as a dictionary

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient._post
documentation:
Make a POST request to the X API.

Args:
    operation: GraphQL operation name
    variables: GraphQL variables
    features: Feature flags
    field_toggles: Field toggles

Returns:
    API response as a dictionary

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_blue_verified_followers
documentation:
Get a user's blue verified followers.

Args:
    user_id: User ID
    count: Number of verified followers to fetch (default: 20)
    include_promoted_content: Include promoted content (default: False)

Returns:
    Timeline: Pydantic model containing the blue verified followers timeline data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_followers
documentation:
Get a user's followers.

Args:
    user_id: User ID
    count: Number of followers to fetch (default: 20)
    include_promoted_content: Include promoted content (default: False)

Returns:
    Timeline: Pydantic model containing the followers timeline data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_following
documentation:
Get a list of users that the specified user follows.

Args:
    user_id: User ID
    count: Number of following users to fetch (default: 20)
    include_promoted_content: Include promoted content (default: False)

Returns:
    Timeline: Pydantic model containing the following timeline data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_users_by_rest_ids
documentation:
Get multiple users by their rest IDs.

Args:
    user_ids: List of user IDs to fetch
    include_tipjar: Include tip jar information
    exclude_directive: Enable GraphQL exclude directive
    verified_phone_label: Enable verified phone label
    skip_profile_image_extensions: Skip profile image extensions
    timeline_navigation: Enable timeline navigation

Returns:
    List[UserResults]: List of Pydantic models containing user data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_user_by_screenname
documentation:
Get a user by their screen name.

Args:
    screenname: User screen name

Returns:
    UserResults: Pydantic model containing the user data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_user_tweets
documentation:
Get a user's tweets.

Args:
    user_id: User ID
    count: Number of tweets to fetch (default: 20)
    include_promoted_content: Include promoted content (default: False)
    with_quick_promote_eligibility_tweet_fields: Include quick promote eligibility tweet fields (default: False)
    with_voice: Include voice (default: False)
    withV2Timeline: Include V2 timeline (default: False)

Returns:
    Timeline: Pydantic model containing the timeline data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.get_home_timeline
documentation:
Get the home timeline.

Args:
    count: Number of tweets to fetch (default: 40)
    cursor: Cursor for pagination
    include_promoted_content: Include promoted content (default: True)
    latest_control_available: Whether latest control is available (default: True)
    seen_tweet_ids: List of tweet IDs that have been seen

Returns:
    Timeline: Pydantic model containing the timeline data

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.favorite_tweet
documentation:
Like/favorite a tweet.

Args:
    tweet_id: ID of the tweet to favorite

Returns:
    FavoriteResponse: Response from the API containing confirmation

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.unfavorite_tweet
documentation:
Unlike/unfavorite a tweet.

Args:
    tweet_id: ID of the tweet to unfavorite

Returns:
    FavoriteResponse: Response from the API containing confirmation

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.create_retweet
documentation:
Retweet a tweet.

Args:
    tweet_id: ID of the tweet to retweet
    dark_request: Whether this is a dark request (default: False)

Returns:
    Tweet: The created retweet

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.delete_retweet
documentation:
Remove a retweet.

Args:
   tweet_id: ID of the source tweet to unretweet
    dark_request: Whether this is a dark request (default: False)

Returns:
    Tweet: The original source tweet

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.create_tweet
documentation:
Create a new tweet with optional media attachments.

Args:
    text: The text content of the tweet
    media_ids: Optional list of media IDs or MediaEntity objects to attach to the tweet
    possibly_sensitive: Whether the media is possibly sensitive (default: False)
    dark_request: Whether this is a dark request (default: False)
    semantic_annotation_ids: List of semantic annotation IDs (optional)
    disallowed_reply_options: List of disallowed reply options (optional)
    reply_to_tweet_id: ID of the tweet to reply to (optional)
    quote_tweet_id: ID of the tweet to quote (optional)

Returns:
    ItemResult: The created tweet result

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid

methods.name: xclient.client.XClient.delete_tweet
documentation:
Delete a tweet.

Args:
    tweet_id: ID of the tweet to delete
    dark_request: Whether this is a dark request (default: False)

Returns:
    DeleteTweetResult: Response confirming the deletion

Raises:
    XAPIError: If the API returns an error response
    httpx.HTTPError: If there's a network or HTTP-related error
    ValueError: If the error response format is invalid
